methods.name: createVault
methods.desc:
Create and initialize the vault
Called once at deployment

methods.name: optInAssets
methods.desc:
Opt the contract into required assets
Must be called by creator after deployment with:
- 5.4 ALGO payment (stays in contract for MBR and operational fees)

methods.name: optIn
methods.desc: User opts into the contract to enable local storage

methods.name: closeOut
methods.desc: User closes out - withdraws all Alpha (deposit + yield)

methods.name: deposit

args.name: slippageBps
args.desc: - Slippage tolerance for auto-compound (ignored if no compound needed)

methods.desc:
User deposits Alpha into the vault
Receives shares proportional to their deposit

If USDC balance >= threshold and has existing depositors, automatically
compounds yield BEFORE processing deposit. This ensures yield goes to
existing depositors, not the new one.

methods.name: withdraw
methods.desc:
User withdraws Alpha from the vault
Receives proportional share of vault's Alpha (original deposit + compounded yield)

methods.name: claimCreator
methods.desc: Creator claims their accumulated Alpha from fees

methods.name: compoundYield
methods.desc:
Swaps accumulated USDC to Alpha and compounds into vault
The Alpha is added to totalAlpha, increasing the value of all shares
Permissionless - anyone can trigger, slippage capped by maxSlippageBps

methods.name: getVaultStats

returns.desc:
[totalShares, totalAlpha, creatorUnclaimedAlpha, usdcBalance, totalYieldCompounded, sharePrice]
Note: sharePrice is scaled by SCALE (1e12) for precision

methods.desc: Get vault statistics

methods.name: getUserAlphaBalance
methods.desc:
Get user's current Alpha balance (shares converted to Alpha)
This includes their original deposit + all compounded yield

methods.name: getUserShares
methods.desc: Get user's share balance

methods.name: previewDeposit
methods.desc: Preview how many shares a deposit would receive

methods.name: previewWithdraw
methods.desc: Preview how much Alpha a share redemption would receive

methods.name: getCompoundQuote
methods.desc: Preview compound - shows expected Alpha for current USDC balance

methods.name: updateMinSwapThreshold
methods.desc: Update the minimum swap threshold

methods.name: updateMaxSlippage
methods.desc:
Update the maximum slippage tolerance for swaps
Only callable by creator

methods.name: updateCreatorAddress
methods.desc:
Update the creator address (key rotation)
Only callable by current creator

methods.name: updateRarefiAddress
methods.desc:
Update the RareFi platform address
Only callable by current RareFi address

methods.name: updateCreatorFeeRate
methods.desc:
Update the creator fee rate
Only callable by creator, constrained to 0-6% range

methods.name: contributeFarm
methods.desc:
Anyone can contribute to the farm by sending Alpha
Farm bonus is distributed proportionally during yield compounds
This allows projects/sponsors to boost yield for depositors

Expects an asset transfer of alphaAsset before this call

methods.name: setEmissionRatio

args.name: newRatio
args.desc: - The emission ratio multiplier (e.g., 4000000 for aggressive distribution)

methods.desc:
Set the emission ratio (multiplier for dynamic farm rate calculation)
Only callable by creator or RareFi
Dynamic rate = farmBalance * emissionRatio / totalAlpha

methods.name: getFarmStats
methods.desc: Get farm statistics including dynamic emission rate

sourceInfo.errorMessage: Alpha and USDC must be different
App call must follow asset transfer
OnCompletion must be CloseOut && can only call when not creating
OnCompletion must be OptIn && can only call when not creating
Only creator can update fee rate
Only creator can update max slippage
Only creator or RareFi can set emission ratio
Only creator or RareFi can update
can only call when not creating
